title: ilex perado subsp. perado
intro: Ilex perado subsp. perado, also known as the Tenerife holly, is a plant species native to the Canary Islands, belonging to the Ilex genus of evergreen trees and shrubs. The medicinal properties of Ilex perado subsp. perado include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to support cardiovascular health, improve cognitive function, and protect against oxidative stress, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Ilex perado subsp. perado include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
